courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Emotional Interface Game
genericDescription: Connect UI state to emotion; use typography, pacing, sound, and layout to shape feeling; maintain usability under expressive presentation.
specificDescription: Build a game where the interface changes in response to player condition, story state, or system pressure. The UI must remain readable and controllable at all times.
gradingRubric: 30 pts expressive UI concept; 20 pts usability; 20 pts technical implementation; 15 pts emotional coherence; 15 pts reflection.
